    CONSTRAINT PK_laborforce_generation_industry_employ_curated PRIMARY KEY (sex_code, generation_code, year)
);

-- generation_codeへの変換
UPDATE laborforce_generation_industry_employ_landing_raw
SET generation =
    CASE
        WHEN generation = N'15歳以上' THEN 0
        WHEN generation = N'15～19歳' THEN 1
        WHEN generation = N'20～24歳' THEN 2
        WHEN generation = N'25～29歳' THEN 3
        WHEN generation = N'30～34歳' THEN 4
        WHEN generation = N'35～39歳' THEN 5
        WHEN generation = N'40～44歳' THEN 6
        WHEN generation = N'45～49歳' THEN 7
        WHEN generation = N'50～54歳' THEN 8
        WHEN generation = N'55～59歳' THEN 9
        WHEN generation = N'60～64歳' THEN 10
        WHEN generation = N'65歳以上' THEN 11
        ELSE NULL
    END
FROM laborforce_generation_industry_employ_landing_raw;

-- yearの'年'削除
UPDATE laborforce_generation_industry_employ_landing_raw
SET year=
    LEFT(year, 4)
FROM laborforce_generation_industry_employ_landing_raw;

-- landing_rawの内容をcuratedに挿入
WITH src AS (
    SELECT
        TRY_CAST(NULLIF(LTRIM(RTRIM(sex_code)), '') AS INT) AS sex_code,

    WHERE sex_code IS NOT NULL
        AND generation IS NOT NULL
        AND year IS NOT NULL
)
MERGE INTO laborforce_generation_industry_employ_curated AS tgt
USING src
    ON tgt.sex_code = src.sex_code
    AND tgt.generation_code = src.generation
    AND tgt.year = src.year

WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET
        tgt.sex_code = src.sex_code,
        tgt.generation_code = src.generation,
        tgt.year = src.year,
        tgt.job_1 = src.job_1,
